{{Infobox group
| name = Titan Force
| introduced = The Captain
}}

''See also: [[Titan Force Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Titan]] [[Force]] was a group of galaxy-defending [[Knights]] tasked with protecting various worlds from monstrous threats, such as the [[D’Niss Swarm]]. Though officially considered retired after successfully driving off the [[D’Niss]], the organization maintains a significant reputation. Their headquarters was located on a terraformed moon orbiting the gas giant [[Delsin]], characterized by dense jungles. The group utilized massive, highly advanced machines known as [[Divine Titans]], which possess power levels surpassing standard [[Aethertech]]. These machines are considered masterpieces of engineering and can be summoned by the [[Knights]] to augment their combat abilities. Some [[Titans]], like the [[Red]] [[Titan]], are uniquely enhanced by solar dragon blood, granting them immense power but also presenting risks of instability. The [[Knights]] operated as a cohesive unit with specialized roles, including [[Red]], [[Blue]], [[Green]], and Yellow [[Knights]]. While the group was once a large force of five members, recent accounts suggest only one survivor remains from the original team.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Titan]] [[Force]] is a renowned group of comrades that includes [[Knights]] and has earned a significant reputation. This organization features the [[Blue Titan]], [[Red]] [[Titan]], and [[Green Titan]] among its members. [[Raion Raithe]] is a part of this group, which he once served in alongside the narrator.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Titan Force]] is a group that includes [[Knights]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21">''The Captain'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Titan Force]] is known by reputation.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c31">''The Captain'', chapter 31</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Titan Force]] includes the [[Blue Titan]], [[Red]] [[Titan]], and [[Green Titan]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c32">''The Captain'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Titan Force]] is a group of comrades [[Raion]] has fought alongside.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c33">''The Captain'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Titan Force]] is a group the narrator and [[Raion]] were previously part of.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c41">''The Captain'', chapter 41</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Titan Force]] is a group that includes [[Raion Raithe]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c47">''The Captain'', chapter 47</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Titan Force]] is a group associated with the [[Red]] [[Knight]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c3">''The Engineer'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Titan Force]] is a group dedicated to the protection of the galaxy.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Raion Raithe]] had time in the [[Titan Force]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c37">''The Engineer'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Titan Force]] is a group that includes Yellow [[Knights]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44">''The Engineer'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Titan]] [[Force]] is an organization that includes both Kyri and the narrator. [[Raion]] is also a member of this group, which maintains its headquarters on [[Delsin]]'s second moon. While the [[Knights]] seek revenge against the organization, the narrator did not join the [[Titan Knights]] during a previous [[life]] involving [[Raion]] and the [[Titan]] [[Force]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Knights]] seek revenge on the [[Titan Force]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c7">''The Knight'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The headquarters of the [[Titan Force]] is on the second moon of [[Delsin]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Titan Force]] is an organization [[Raion]] belongs to.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator never joined the [[Titan Knights]] in a previous [[life]] involving [[Raion]] and the [[Titan Force]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c15">''The Knight'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Titan Force]] is a group that includes the narrator and Kyri.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c31">''The Knight'', chapter 31</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
